title: DIABETES SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: DIABETES SUPPORT SERVICES DIABETES SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about weekly diabetes classes, one-on-one consultations, and support groups. Support groups often include a medical professional speaker and information on exercise, diet, diabetic products and services. Child care is available upon request. Supplies such as meters, strips, and lancets may be available depending on supplies. 1274 Cunningham Lane S Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: People with a pre-diabetes or diabetes diagnosis (Type 1 or Type 2), including parents of children with diabetes Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 11am-3pm Whole Body Sonic sessions: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 11am-3pm or by appointment Email (503) 585-1335 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 585-1335 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the lower level of Temple Beth Sholom. Turn into the first driveway by the large grey building and locate the second set of glass double doors. Ring the bell for access. Services: Disease/Disability Information * Diabetes Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Diabetes Insulin Injection Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - THE JIGGLE JOINT WHOLE BODY SONIC VIBRATION SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - DIABETES MADE SIMPLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
